subject: [PATCH v3 13/20] f2fs: convert iomap ops to ->iomap_next()

2026-07-20.patch_summary: This patch converts the iomap operations for the F2FS file system to use the new ->iomap_next() callback, which is generated using the DEFINE_IOMAP_ITER_NEXT() macro. This change does not introduce any functional changes and is a conversion to align with the new API. The patch modifies the data.c file in the fs/f2fs directory by replacing the existing iomap_begin function with the newly defined f2fs_iomap_next function.
